purpose: Human-readable API index with semantic intent and UI consumers.

endpoints.intent: Expose observer snapshots for safety state and diagnostics.
endpoints.failure_mode: Return empty array on no history.

endpoints.intent: Expose outcome trail of publisher runs (auto/manual).
Provide scheduling guidance using activity trends.
Provide draft visibility for operator confidence.
Trigger observer run and return fail-closed status.
Trigger publish sequence with optional force override.
endpoints.failure_mode: 500 when policy or post-submit verification fails.

endpoints.intent: Read effective runtime controls and scheduler state.
Return analytic payload for competitor EDA workflows.
Return last cached Grok 4 scheduling recommendation. Read-only. Returns { recommendation: null } when XAI_API_KEY absent or advisor disabled.
endpoints.failure_mode: Returns { recommendation: null, source: 'disabled' } when key absent. Never throws.

pending_additions.intent: Apply cached AI recommendation to control-panel state. 422 if stale or absent.
Parse natural language instruction and dispatch to existing API endpoints.

alignment_notes: This catalog complements api-contract.json; api-contract remains schema-authoritative.
When adding/removing endpoints, update both files in the same change.
pending_additions are specified but not yet implemented — move to endpoints[] when each sprint lands.
